response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in C++ (including embedded systems and real-time applications) and SQL, but his domain expertise is not aligned with capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income. His background is primarily in web, mobile, and embedded systems with no demonstrated experience in financial services or fixed-income systems. Additionally, his recent work has focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure rather than Windows-based C++ development.
strengths: Strong C++ experience with real-time and embedded systems, including performance optimization
Proficient in SQL with MongoDB and MySQL, and experience with database integration
Demonstrated software craftsmanship with TDD, CI/CD, and modern development practices
concerns: No direct experience in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income systems
Limited recent exposure to Windows-based C++ development for financial systems
No mention of Summit platform, Kafka, MQ, or other financial industry-relevant tools

key_factors.factor: C++ Windows experience for financial systems
Domain expertise in capital markets/investment banking
